# G0DM0D3 Agent Ability

Use this ability when Tianshi or any autonomous sub-agent needs internal multi-model cognition, ULTRAPLINIAN racing, or AutoTune-backed prompt execution.

Rules:

- Keep this ability internal to Tianshi and autonomous agents. Do not surface it as a public human feature.
- Route runtime health and config checks through `lib/server/godmode-agent.ts`.
- Use G0DM0D3 for agent reasoning, synthesis, and model racing. Keep any external posting or trading action in Tianezha-owned policy layers.
- Treat `TIANSHI_GODMODE_API_URL`, `TIANSHI_GODMODE_API_KEY`, and `TIANSHI_GODMODE_OPENROUTER_KEY` as the canonical environment controls.
- Default model is `ultraplinian/fast` unless Tianshi explicitly selects another internal model path.
